settings.user_message: Shuffle Ocarina Notes + Chants en Folie

Colossus (Spirit Temple).text: They say that #the Graveyard# is on the path to #King Dodongo#.

DMC (Bombable Wall).text: They say that playing #Sun's Song# in a grave spawns #a Heart Container#.

DMC (Upper Grotto).text: They say that at the #Bombchu Bowling Alley#, you will be rewarded with...^ #a Bomb Bag# and #Bombchus (10 pieces)#.

DMT (Biggoron).text: They say that the #Ocarina of Time# teaches #Arrows (30 pieces)#.

DMT (Storms Grotto).text: They say that playing #Sun's Song# in a grave spawns #a Heart Container#.
